decks.notes: The deck focuses on assembling the Lotus Field combo, utilizing cards like Hidden Strings, Into the Flood Maw, and Thespian's Stage to generate mana and card advantage. The goal is to ramp up quickly, find Lotus Field, and then utilize its ability to generate large amounts of mana to cast game-ending spells like Omniscience or Peer into the Abyss. The deck also includes protection and search cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Sylvan Scrying to ensure the combo goes off smoothly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with instant and sorcery spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix while maintaining card advantage through draw spells like Sleight of Hand and Treasure Cruise. It also includes cards like Lightning Axe and Fiery Impulse for removal, with the potential to quickly close out games with powerful spells like Temporal Trespass. The deck aims to be aggressive and proactive, utilizing the graveyard as a resource to overwhelm opponents and secure victory.

This aggro deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix from the graveyard. Cards like Consider, Opt, and Sleight of Hand help dig for more spells while Ledger Shredder and Picklock Prankster provide additional ways to cast multiple spells in a turn. Fiery Impulse and Lightning Axe help to clear the way for attacks, while cards like Spell Pierce and Spell Pierce help protect key pieces like Arclight Phoenix. Treasure Cruise helps refill the hand while cards like Riverglide Pathway and Hall of Storm Giants provide additional mana to cast spells.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress, while also controlling the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay. It also utilizes efficient creatures like Graveyard Trespasser and Sentinel of the Nameless City to pressure the opponent. The deck's key strength lies in its ability to adapt to various strategies and outvalue the opponent over the course of the game, ultimately leading to a strong control finish with powerful threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse.

The main concept of this Aggro-Arclight Phoenix deck is to quickly cycle through your deck to get Arclight Phoenix into your graveyard and bring it back for repeated attacks. The deck includes card draw spells like Sleight of Hand and Opt, removal spells like Fiery Impulse and Lightning Axe, and ways to bring back Arclight Phoenix such as Proft's Eidetic Memory and Into the Flood Maw. The deck also includes counterspells like Spell Pierce to protect your creatures and Treasure Cruise to refill your hand. The resource management and aggressive playstyle are essential for success.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Lotus Field and other cards to cast powerful combo spells like Emergent Ultimatum and Peer into the Abyss. It also includes cards to protect and support the combo, such as Arboreal Grazer and Hidden Strings. The goal is to establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of high-impact spells and mana acceleration. The inclusion of Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Formidable Speaker adds versatility and additional win conditions to the deck. Overall, the deck aims to quickly and efficiently assemble its combo pieces to secure victory.

The main concept of this UR Aggro Pioneer deck is to have a fast and aggressive strategy by utilizing strong creatures like Gran-Gran and Vivi Ornitier, along with spells like Combustion Technique and Divide by Zero to control the board and deal damage quickly. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and tempo plays like Consider to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to apply pressure early on while maintaining card advantage and controlling the game through spells and efficient creatures.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by countering opponents' spells and removing threats from the board. It utilizes cards like Dovin's Veto, Teferi, Hero of Dominaria, and Supreme Verdict to control the game tempo. The deck also includes a strong card draw engine with cards like Memory Deluge and Consult the Star Charts, allowing the player to maintain card advantage. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion provides additional value and versatility to the deck. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through careful resource management and strategic plays.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, as well as disruptive cards like Duress and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan. It also includes powerful threats like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to pressure the opponent. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent through card advantage, while maintaining a strong board presence with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sentinel of the Nameless City. Overall, the deck seeks to dominate the game through efficient removal and powerful creatures.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on aggressive plays with efficient creatures and disruptive spells to control the opponent's board. Cards like Archon of Emeria and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben slow down the opponent while cards like Collected Company and Skyclave Apparition provide additional value and removal. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and disruptive spells, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize and control the game. The main goal is to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game.

This deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays using creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Moon-Circuit Hacker to quickly deal damage to your opponent. Floodpits Drowner and Gloomlake Verge provide additional pressure, while Mutavault and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares offer versatile threats. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help control the board, while Enduring Curiosity provides card advantage. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Spell Pierce and Go for the Throat, making it difficult for your opponent to stabilize. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with its aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy with a mix of evasion, disruption, and removal. It aims to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game with creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Moon-Circuit Hacker while using cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board. Multiversal Passage and Gloomlake Verge provide additional utility and flexibility, allowing for strategic positioning and resource management. The inclusion of cards like Anoint with Affliction and Otawara, Soaring City adds extra situational advantage, while cards like Brazen Borrower and Go for the Throat offer versatile removal options.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix from the graveyard, while also efficiently drawing through the deck with card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. Fiery Impulse and Lightning Axe provide removal options, while Treasure Cruise refills the hand with more spells. The deck aims to be aggressive and take advantage of the Arclight Phoenix's ability to return to the battlefield, overwhelming the opponent with a combination of spells and creatures.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on early game aggression and tempo with cheap spells and efficient creatures like Soul-Scar Mage and Monastery Swiftspear. It aims to quickly deal damage using burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, as well as pump spells like Flow State. The inclusion of cards like Academic Dispute and Slickshot Show-Off provides additional card advantage and utility. The deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish a strong board presence, utilizing a mix of instant-speed spells and creatures with prowess to maintain pressure.

The main strategy of this aggro red deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by playing low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while also utilizing burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to keep the pressure on. The deck focuses on maintaining board presence with cards like Emberheart Challenger and Kumano Faces Kakkazan, along with utility creatures like Robber of the Rich. Additional reach is provided by cards like Ramunap Ruins and Mutavault. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures and direct damage spells.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with low-cost spells and creatures to deal damage efficiently. It includes a mix of burn spells, card draw, and cheap creatures to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also features bounce spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining aggressive creatures with direct damage spells and control elements, this deck aims to maintain tempo and end the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.
